steps.title: Map the passage moves
steps.content: The passage first introduces a survey study in Bogota and Fortaleza and gives park-use results. It then considers whether nearby nonpark amenities explain the difference and rejects that explanation.

steps.title: Reject inaccurate structures
steps.content:
• Choice A describes two studies, but the passage presents one study.
  • Choice C blames the survey method, which the passage does not do.
  • Choice D invents an unresolved planning question.

steps.title: Match study and rejection
steps.content: The remaining choice accurately says the study is introduced, then a possible explanation for some results is considered and rejected. The answer is B.
